[PDF_PAGE 11 | score=3] (B) Restitution to the owner of the bank- rupted retailer equal to seven (7) years profit based upon past sales notwithstand- ing the year previous to the loss of busi- ness, or the best three years' profit within a fifteen (15) year time period, whichever is higher, to be paid in full upon demand of the injured company, including taxes on said monies. (C) Reimbursement to the government of Ravens Bluff in the form of fines equal to one-half total monies paid in parts A and B of Section 3 in Article IV for the com- pensation of lost taxes on the monies lost in the bankrupt actions against the retail- er and the unemployed individual or indi- viduals, to be paid in full immediately, or within
[PDF_PAGE 13 | score=3] When Prismal reached the age of five, sohei from a nearby monastery assassi- nated his parents, taking Prismal, his brother, and all the family's wealth with them. The men dropped Prismal in the Dunes of Death, an ocean of sand more than 2,000 miles across. The sohei left Prismal to die, as he refused to cooper- ate with them. The men took his broth- er and disappeared. After seven harsh months, during which Prismal barely survived, wander- ing priests happened upon the boy and escorted him to their monastery. At age 25, he became a monk, and to this day his arms bear the burns of his fellowship: a leopard on his right arm and an oriental dragon on his left. On Prismal's 30th birthday, the m
[PDF_PAGE 14 | score=3] Mortimer is the owner and manager of Chemcheaux 223. Mortimer's, large frame makes him appear slow, but he is very dexterous, and his incredible strength makes him a foe to be respected. With occasional assistance from Rhodhan, Mortimer keeps the increas- ing demands of the business at bay. Born in Calimport, Toril, Mortimer was once looked down upon by the na- tive Ravens Bluff people. Since he pur- chased the Chemcheaux franchise from Prismal and Rhodhan, however, his social status has taken a turn for the better. He is now invited to the large balls and elite social gatherings attend- ed by only the very rich, or the very powerful. Mortimer relishes the lime- light. Chemcheaux 223 was onc
[PDF_PAGE 21 | score=2] Amulet Antennae Name Amulet, Orcish, Combat +1 Amulet, Orcish, Damage +1 Amulet, Orcish, Saves +1 Amulet, Parasites Amulet, Perpetual Youth Amulet, Planes, of the Amulet, Power Amulet, Proof against Detection & Location Amulet, Protection +1 Amulet, Protection +2 Amulet, Protection +3 Amulet, Protection +4 Amulet, Protection + 5 Amulet, Protection, Alignment Change Amulet, Protection, Crystal Ball and ESP Amulet, Protection, Good Amulet, Protection, Life Amulet, Protection, Sharks Amulet, Protection, Sleep Amulet, Psionic Reflection Amulet, Shield Amulet, Sleeplessnesss Amulet, Spinecastle Amulet, Thet of Ptah Amulet, Timekeeping Amulet, Undead, 4th Level Amulet, Undead, 5th Level Amulet, Un
[PDF_PAGE 36 | score=2] Box Bridge Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Box Boxes can be constructed of solid wood, metal, wooden slats, paper-board, paper, and on occasion, mysterious substances that resemble stone or rock. Magical boxes can be used to entrap vile (or even good) creatures. Overall, however, boxes have a multitude of possible functions making them a fairly safe item to find. [PDF_PAGE 46 | score=2] Clothing Collar Name Clothing, Perfect Fit Clothing, Protection +1 Clothing, Protection + 2 Clothing, Protection +3 Clothing, Protection + 4 Clothing, Protection + 5 EP Cost Book/Page 1,000 5,000 DRAG073-39 Name EP Cost Book/Page 1,000 2,000 3,000 4,000 5,000 Clover Clover is a small plant famous for bringing good luck. It is said that in every 100 or 1,000 clover stems, only one sports four leaves. By picking the leaf, it is said that the holder is granted good luck until the leaf begins to wilt (which takes about four minutes.) Clover, Four-Leaf Club A club is a heavy stick that is usually thicker at one end than at the other. When grasped at the thin end, the club can be used as a bludgeo

The crew are unseen servants that can perform jobs like m
[PDF_PAGE 51 | score=2] Cushion Dagger Name Cushion, Regeneration Cutlass +1 Cutlass +2 Cutlass +3 Cutlass +4 Cutlass, Blackjammer's Cutlass, Golden Gulf +1 EP Cost Book/Page Cushion A cushion is a soft pillow used for prolonged sitting, kneeling, or reclining. Cushions generally are made of cloth or leather and filled with feathers, felt, straw, or animal hair. They are placed on chairs and couches to make them more comfortable. Some cultures dispense with furniture and put cushions directly on the floor. Name 40,000 POLY043-214,000 Cutlass A cutlass is a heavy, narrow sword with a curved blade. The curved blade gives the sword more cutting power. Magical cutlasses are very rare and are highly prized. See the Dagg
